meaning: vt.恢复,使回复,归还,交还,修复,重建
examples: Troops were sent in to restore order.
The police are trying to restore public order.
We will restore her to health but it may take time.
Kaminski-Morrow points to issues faced by an initially successful effort to restore an Avro Vulcan to flight.
The aim is to encourage banks to start lending to each other again and restore investor confidence.
